title: Barrel & Bullet Saloon Initial State
summary: Before the first bank job, the saloon is the party's convergence point, rumor mill, and briefing room for work tied to Mugland and the wider city.
notes:
The Barrel & Bullet is a squat two-story tavern known for cheap rooms, decent food, loud regulars, and a constant edge of danger. Run by Foebe Dunsmith, it works as a place to broker jobs, hide from enemies, hold private meetings, access basic crafting support, and regroup between operations.

This opening state covers the party assembling here, hearing the bank heist pitch, gathering first bank rumors, and noticing scavenger side material without letting it take over the session.
